title: Weirdest Craft
description: Adds 2 new structures ,and a new duck mob that can be found in one that drops duck meat which can be used to make beans. Lastly, it adds bacon and chicken wings.
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Adds** _2_ new structures ,and a new duck mob that can be found in one that drops duck meat which can be used to make beans. Lastly, it adds bacon and chicken wings.                                   


</details>



                                 ⚠️ **Warning **‼️ ⚠️ 
                                   Mod Is Very
                                    Cursed
                                   Play at
                                   own risk
